career_paths.summary: Cipher Monk — a Angelic/Water calling unlocked at BETA.
career_paths.lore: The Cipher Monk walks a narrow path through the Cyber Square, bound to the Angelic discipline and the Water current. They told you the NetPs chose their handlers. They were wrong. Their work bends toward ATK, at the cost of HP.

career_paths.title: Anvil Saint of the Free Node (847)
career_paths.opening_line: A soul band is just a scar you can read. Yours opened on a Tuesday.
career_paths.summary: Anvil Saint — a Angelic/Fire calling unlocked at EPSILON.
career_paths.lore: The Anvil Saint walks a narrow path through the Free Node, bound to the Angelic discipline and the Fire current. A soul band is just a scar you can read. Yours opened on a Tuesday. Their work bends toward CHARGE, at the cost of ATK.

career_paths.title: Storm Caller of the Synthetic Network (848)
career_paths.opening_line: You traded a body for a bandwidth cap and never looked back.
career_paths.summary: Storm Caller — a Mechanical/Lightning calling unlocked at ETA.
career_paths.lore: The Storm Caller walks a narrow path through the Synthetic Network, bound to the Mechanical discipline and the Lightning current. You traded a body for a bandwidth cap and never looked back. Their work bends toward ATK, at the cost of DEF.

career_paths.lore: The Soul Binder walks a narrow path through the Quiet Sector, bound to the Mechanical discipline and the Water current. You traded a body for a bandwidth cap and never looked back. Their work bends toward DEF, at the cost of ATK.

career_paths.title: Gravity Adept of the Celestial Order (850)
career_paths.opening_line: They told you the NetPs chose their handlers. They were wrong.
career_paths.summary: Gravity Adept — a Angelic/Nature calling unlocked at ALPHA.
career_paths.lore: The Gravity Adept walks a narrow path through the Celestial Order, bound to the Angelic discipline and the Nature current. They told you the NetPs chose their handlers. They were wrong. Their work bends toward DEF, at the cost of CHARGE.

career_paths.title: Stone Fist of the The Deep N3T (851)
career_paths.opening_line: The Kernal interface lit up and, for once, did not lie to you.
career_paths.summary: Stone Fist — a Viral/Light calling unlocked at EPSILON.
career_paths.lore: The Stone Fist walks a narrow path through the The Deep N3T, bound to the Viral discipline and the Light current. The Kernal interface lit up and, for once, did not lie to you. Their work bends toward CHARGE, at the cost of RAPID.

career_paths.title: Stone Fist of the Free Node (852)
career_paths.opening_line: The first time the N3T spoke your name, you were already halfway gone.
career_paths.summary: Stone Fist — a Viral/Fire calling unlocked at GAMMA.
career_paths.lore: The Stone Fist walks a narrow path through the Free Node, bound to the Viral discipline and the Fire current. The first time the N3T spoke your name, you were already halfway gone. Their work bends toward ATK, at the cost of DEF.
